state.next-action: `20-05` is now complete. The block lab adds a `Live` tab that refreshes real Grime Time page blocks through a local Payload-backed route (`src/app/api/internal/block-lab/blocks/route.ts`), proxies that data through the studio (`tools/grime-block-lab/app/api/grime-time/blocks/route.ts`), and lets supported blocks such as `service-grid` load directly into the preview as the new base `toolInput`. Verification passed for targeted `biome check`, `npm.cmd run build` in `tools/grime-block-lab`, and `npm.cmd run build` in the main Grime Time app after excluding the nested lab package from the root TypeScript project. The email-driven block proposal idea has been parked as a todo for later exploration while we learn the studio better. Next action: resume `19-02` and use the studio's live block catalog to debug page-local media-slot behavior without restoring the old gallery model.
